steps.title: Compare the two minerals
steps.content: The goal is to compare fluorite and corundum. The notes say fluorite has a Mohs number of 4, corundum has a Mohs number of 9, and minerals with larger numbers can scratch minerals with smaller numbers.

steps.title: Keep the right pair
steps.content: Choice B compares quartz and fluorite, not corundum and fluorite. Choice C compares corundum and quartz, not the requested pair. Choice D describes ordering three minerals generally but does not directly compare fluorite and corundum. The remaining choice applies the scratch rule to the two target minerals. The answer is A.
